title: Workflows very very slow

posts.author: FdL (Franck de Luca)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I discovered the workflows about one month ago and I’m a huge fan. They are not perfect, but it saves me a huge quantity of automations and a huge quantity of time.

My main concern with them is that they are really slow. I use workflows that will go through around 8 blocks, so not a lot. Unfortunately, it takes an average of 20 seconds to be completed. in comparison, the same thing done in automation would take around 2 secs to show on the screen.

For the users in my company, it looks like monday.com is not working working properly. Faster workflows would improve the user experience and the adoption of monday.com as a fast and reliable tool.

Thank you

Franck
